{{Quote|Make Room. Make Room. Puzzle-solver Smiley slicing through!|Smiley|<ref name="Rookies: No Turning Back">''[[Rookies: No Turning Back]]''</ref>}}
'''Smileredon-Verdont''', better known as '''Smiley''', was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Squib/Legends|Squib]] with blue fur and yellow [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].

==Biography==
[[File:Smiley_running.jpg|thumb|left]]
Although he claimed to have been born on the flagship ''[[Wholesale]]'' of the [[Squib Reclamation Fleet]], Smiley hailed from [[Metrobig City]] on [[Skor II]]. When he was only seven, his parents, both industrial traders, gave him to another family in exchange for a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[borelifter]].<ref name="Heroes & Rogues" />

Smileredon-Verdont ended up as a companion to a trader from the [[Minos Cluster/Legends|Minos Cluster]]. During this time, Smiley claimed, the pair visited the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Yelsain/Legends|Yelsain]] and "tamed the woods" there. Smiley took to dressing in the style of a [[Yelsain/Legends|Yelsain tree-dweller]] at this time. A few [[Standard year/Legends|years]] later, the trader lost his [[Starship/Legends|ship]] to impoundment, and Smiley took to wandering about the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="Heroes & Rogues" />

He claimed to be a practitioner of the [[Mystic Martial Arts of Squib Combats and Transactions]], although whether there was any truth to his claim remains uncertain.

Sometime before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the Squib became an associate of the gambler [[Raal Yorta]] and the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Sammie Staable]]. While Raal and Sammie chased [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]], Smiley was a pickpocket, stealing [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and [[Chronometer/Legends|chronos]].<ref name="Rendezvous" /> Prior to the Battle of Yavin, Smileredon-Verdont, Raal Yorta and Sammie Staable attempted a heist on the ''Coral Vanda''.<ref name="TCSWE-CoralVanda">{{CSWECite|I|140|''Coral Vanda''}}</ref>

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Smiley_with_garbage_grabber.jpg|thumb]]
Smiley was based on a character roleplayed by [[Orrin Marko]], in the ''Rebel Breakout'' scenario of the [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game (first edition)|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'']] gamemastered by [[Pablo Hidalgo]].<ref name="Origin of the Rookies">{{Blog|pablog|88|Origin of the Rookies}}</ref>

In 1996, Hidalgo included the character in the [[West End Games]] sourcebook ''[[Heroes & Rogues]]'' as a worked example of the "Annoying Squib" character template.

Hidalgo's original full name for Smiley was Smileredon-Verdonté. Unfortunately, West End Games format did not recognize the special character '''é''', and published the name as Smileredon-Verdont.
